title: Object
description: An object consists of data and its descriptive metadata.

Key.description: The name assigned to an object which identifies it in the bucket.

LastModified.description: Date and time the object was last modified.

ETag.description: The entity tag is a hash of the object. The ETag reflects changes only to the contents of an object, not its metadata.

Size.description: Size in bytes of the object.

StorageClass.description: The class of storage used to store the object.
